positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for club_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u33,negated_conjecture,
    ~performs_talent(bonnie)).

cnf(u38,negated_conjecture,
    chaperones(bonnie)).

cnf(u43,axiom,
    ~attends_engaged(bonnie)).

cnf(u46,axiom,
    ~student_attends(bonnie)).

cnf(u54,axiom,
    inactive_disinterested(bonnie)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~performs_talent(X0) | attends_engaged(X0) | ~in_club(X0)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    ~inactive_disinterested(X0) | chaperones(X0) | ~in_club(X0)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    ~student_attends(X0) | ~chaperones(X0) | ~in_club(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~in_club(X0) | inactive_disinterested(X0) | performs_talent(X0)).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    in_club(bonnie)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define young_wishes_academic(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
